subject: chore(search): list triggerRef in SearchModalProvider useMemo deps
body:
Comment says "listing all for exhaustive-deps compliance" but the deps
array omitted triggerRef. It's a stable RefObject so behavior is
unchanged — this just reconciles the code with its stated intent and
keeps exhaustive-deps lint happy.
